parameters.query: SELECT * FROM public.users WHERE telegram_user_id = $1 LIMIT 1;

parameters.text: ✅ درخواست شما با موفقیت ثبت شد.  ⏳ حساب شما در انتظار بررسی و تایید مدیر است. پس از نهایی شدن، نتیجه برای شما ارسال می‌شود.

=👋 خوش آمدید

✅ شما به عنوان کارمند وارد سامانه شدید.
لطفاً یکی از گزینه‌های زیر را انتخاب کنید:
⏳ درخواست شما قبلاً ثبت شده است.  حساب شما هنوز در انتظار تایید مدیر قرار دارد.
❌ درخواست شما رد شده است.  برای پیگیری، لطفاً با پشتیبانی یا مدیر مربوطه تماس بگیرید.

parameters.query:
SELECT telegram_user_id
FROM public.users
WHERE access_level = 'admin'
  AND status = 'approved'
ORDER BY id ASC;

UPDATE public.users
SET
  status = 'rejected',
  approved_by = $1,
  rejected_at = NOW()
WHERE telegram_user_id = $2
  AND status = 'pending'
RETURNING *;

parameters.text:

در صورت نیاز، برای پیگیری با پشتیبانی تماس بگیرید.

parameters.query:
UPDATE public.users
SET
  status = 'approved',
  access_level = $1,
  department = $2,
  approved_by = $3,
  approved_at = NOW()
WHERE telegram_user_id = $4
  AND status = 'pending'
RETURNING *;

=👋 خوش آمدید

🛠 شما به عنوان مدیر وارد سامانه شدید.
لطفاً یکی از گزینه‌های زیر را انتخاب کنید:

parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM user_actions
WHERE telegram_user_id = $1
  AND status = 'active'
  AND action_type IN (
    'add_day_menu',
    'edit_day_menu',
    'status_employee_search',
   'status_employee_report_search'
  )
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO draft_week_menu (telegram_user_id, food1, food2, created_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, NOW());

SELECT id, week_start_date, day_of_week, food1, food2,food3
FROM week_menu
WHERE week_start_date = $1
  AND day_of_week = $2
LIMIT 1;

parameters.text:
=⚠️ حذف منوی غذای کارکنان

آیا مطمئن هستید که این منوی روز از برنامه غذایی هفته حذف شود؟

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO user_actions (
  telegram_user_id,
  action_type,
  action_data,
  status,
  created_at
)
SELECT
  $1,
  'edit_day_menu',
  json_build_object(
    'menu_id', wm.id,
    'week_start_date', wm.week_start_date,
    'day_of_week', wm.day_of_week
  ),
  'active',
  NOW()
FROM week_menu wm
WHERE wm.id = $2::bigint
RETURNING *;

parameters.text:
=✏️ ویرایش منوی غذای کارکنان

لطفاً غذاهای جدید را با فرمت زیر ارسال کنید:

غذا ۱ - غذا ۲ - غذا ۳

غذای سوم اختیاری است.

مثال:
جوجه کباب - عدس‌پلو - خوراک مرغ

parameters.query:
UPDATE week_menu
SET
  food1 = NULLIF(NULLIF(NULLIF(BTRIM($1::text), ''), 'null'), 'undefined'),
  food2 = NULLIF(NULLIF(NULLIF(BTRIM($2::text), ''), 'null'), 'undefined'),
  food3 = NULLIF(NULLIF(NULLIF(BTRIM($3::text), ''), 'null'), 'undefined')
WHERE week_start_date = $4
  AND day_of_week = $5
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO week_menu (week_start_date, day_of_week, food1, food2, food3)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  NULLIF(NULLIF(NULLIF(BTRIM($3::text), ''), 'null'), 'undefined'),
  NULLIF(NULLIF(NULLIF(BTRIM($4::text), ''), 'null'), 'undefined'),
  NULLIF(NULLIF(NULLIF(BTRIM($5::text), ''), 'null'), 'undefined')
)
ON CONFLICT (week_start_date, day_of_week)
DO UPDATE SET
  food1 = EXCLUDED.food1,
  food2 = EXCLUDED.food2,
  food3 = EXCLUDED.food3
RETURNING *;

SELECT day_of_week, food1, food2, food3
FROM week_menu
WHERE week_start_date = $1
  AND day_of_week IN ('شنبه','یکشنبه','دوشنبه','سه شنبه','چهارشنبه','پنج شنبه');

INSERT INTO reservations (
  telegram_user_id,
  day_of_week,
  food)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  $3
)
ON CONFLICT (telegram_user_id, day_of_week)
DO UPDATE SET
  food = EXCLUDED.food
RETURNING *;

SELECT DISTINCT telegram_user_id
FROM public.users
WHERE access_level = 'admin'
  AND status = 'approved'
  AND telegram_user_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY telegram_user_id ASC;

parameters.text: ={{ $json.text }}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  r.id,
  r.telegram_user_id,
  u.first_name,
  u.last_name,
  u.username,
  r.week_start_date,
  r.day_of_week,
  r.food,
  r.portion_label,
  r.portion_qty,
  r.reserved_at
FROM reservations r
LEFT JOIN users u
  ON u.telegram_user_id::text = r.telegram_user_id::text
WHERE r.week_start_date = $1
ORDER BY
  CASE r.day_of_week
    WHEN 'شنبه' THEN 1
    WHEN 'یکشنبه' THEN 2
    WHEN 'دوشنبه' THEN 3
    WHEN 'سه شنبه' THEN 4
    WHEN 'چهارشنبه' THEN 5
    WHEN 'پنج شنبه' THEN 6
    ELSE 99
  END,
  u.first_name,
  u.last_name,
  r.reserved_at;

parameters.text: ={{ $json.text }}
📊 گزارش رزروها  لطفاً نوع گزارش موردنظر را انتخاب کنید:

parameters.query:
WITH filtered_reservations AS (
  SELECT
    telegram_user_id::text AS telegram_user_id,
    REPLACE(TRIM(day_of_week), '‌', ' ') AS day_of_week,
    NULLIF(TRIM(food), '') AS food,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(portion_label), ''), 'پرس کامل') AS portion_label,
    COALESCE(portion_qty, 1)::numeric AS portion_qty
  FROM reservations
  WHERE week_start_date = $1
),

weekly_totals AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS total_reservations,
    COUNT(DISTINCT telegram_user_id)::bigint AS weekly_unique_users,
    COALESCE(SUM(portion_qty), 0)::numeric AS weekly_total_portion_qty
  FROM filtered_reservations
),

grouped_summary AS (
  SELECT
    day_of_week,
    food,
    portion_label,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS people_count,
    COALESCE(SUM(portion_qty), 0)::numeric AS total_portion_qty
  FROM filtered_reservations
  WHERE food IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY day_of_week, food, portion_label
),

final_rows AS (
  SELECT
    grouped_summary.day_of_week,
    grouped_summary.food,
    grouped_summary.portion_label,
    grouped_summary.people_count,
    grouped_summary.total_portion_qty,
    weekly_totals.total_reservations,
    weekly_totals.weekly_unique_users,
    weekly_totals.weekly_total_portion_qty,
    CASE grouped_summary.day_of_week
      WHEN 'شنبه' THEN 1
      WHEN 'یکشنبه' THEN 2
      WHEN 'دوشنبه' THEN 3
      WHEN 'سه شنبه' THEN 4
      WHEN 'سه‌شنبه' THEN 4
      WHEN 'چهارشنبه' THEN 5
      WHEN 'پنج شنبه' THEN 6
      WHEN 'پنج‌شنبه' THEN 6
      ELSE 99
    END AS day_sort,
    CASE grouped_summary.portion_label
      WHEN 'پرس کامل' THEN 1
      WHEN 'نیم پرس' THEN 2
      WHEN 'خوراک' THEN 3
      ELSE 99
    END AS portion_sort
  FROM grouped_summary
  CROSS JOIN weekly_totals

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    NULL::text AS day_of_week,
    NULL::text AS food,
    NULL::text AS portion_label,
    0::bigint AS people_count,
    0::numeric AS total_portion_qty,
    weekly_totals.total_reservations,
    weekly_totals.weekly_unique_users,
    weekly_totals.weekly_total_portion_qty,
    999 AS day_sort,
    999 AS portion_sort
  FROM weekly_totals
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM grouped_summary)
)

SELECT
  $1::date AS target_week_start,
  day_of_week,
  food,
  portion_label,
  people_count,
  total_portion_qty,
  total_reservations,
  weekly_unique_users,
  weekly_total_portion_qty
FROM final_rows
ORDER BY
  day_sort,
  food NULLS LAST,
  portion_sort;

parameters.text: ={{ $json.text }}

parameters.query:
SELECT day_of_week, food1, food2,food3, week_start_date
FROM week_menu
WHERE week_start_date = $1
ORDER BY CASE day_of_week
  WHEN 'شنبه' THEN 1
  WHEN 'یکشنبه' THEN 2
  WHEN 'دوشنبه' THEN 3
  WHEN 'سه شنبه' THEN 4
  WHEN 'چهارشنبه' THEN 5
  WHEN 'پنج شنبه' THEN 6
END;

SELECT day_of_week, food, portion_label, week_start_date
FROM reservations
WHERE telegram_user_id = $1
  AND week_start_date = $2;

SELECT day_of_week, food1, food2,food3, week_start_date
FROM week_menu
WHERE week_start_date = $1
  AND day_of_week = $2
LIMIT 1;

SELECT day_of_week, food, week_start_date
FROM reservations
WHERE telegram_user_id = $1
  AND week_start_date = $2
  AND day_of_week = $3
LIMIT 1;

WITH selected_menu AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN $4 = 'f1' THEN food1
      WHEN $4 = 'f2' THEN food2
      WHEN $4 = 'f3' THEN food3
      ELSE NULL
    END AS selected_food
  FROM week_menu
  WHERE week_start_date = $2
    AND day_of_week = $3
  LIMIT 1
),
portion AS (
  SELECT
    $5::text AS portion_type,
    CASE $5
      WHEN 'full' THEN 'پرس کامل'
      WHEN 'half' THEN 'نیم پرس'
      WHEN 'khorak' THEN 'خوراک'
      ELSE 'پرس کامل'
    END AS portion_label,
    CASE $5
      WHEN 'full' THEN 1
      WHEN 'half' THEN 0.5
      WHEN 'khorak' THEN 1
      ELSE 1
    END::numeric AS portion_qty
)
INSERT INTO reservations (
  telegram_user_id,
  week_start_date,
  day_of_week,
  food,
  food_slot,
  portion_type,
  portion_label,
  portion_qty
)
SELECT
  $1,
  $2,
  $3,
  selected_menu.selected_food,
  $4,
  portion.portion_type,
  portion.portion_label,
  portion.portion_qty
FROM selected_menu, portion
WHERE selected_menu.selected_food IS NOT NULL
ON CONFLICT (telegram_user_id, week_start_date, day_of_week)
DO UPDATE SET
  food = EXCLUDED.food,
  food_slot = EXCLUDED.food_slot,
  portion_type = EXCLUDED.portion_type,
  portion_label = EXCLUDED.portion_label,
  portion_qty = EXCLUDED.portion_qty,
  reserved_at = NOW()
RETURNING *;

  AND week_start_date = $2

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  code,
  title,
  emoji,
  sort_order
FROM work_statuses
WHERE is_active = TRUE
  AND parent_id IS NULL
ORDER BY sort_order, id;

WITH valid_status AS (
  SELECT code
  FROM work_statuses
  WHERE code = $2
    AND is_active = TRUE
    AND is_selectable = TRUE
    AND parent_id IS NOT NULL
  LIMIT 1
)
INSERT INTO user_current_status (
  telegram_user_id,
  status_code,
  updated_at,
  updated_by
)
SELECT
  $1,
  valid_status.code,
  NOW(),
  $1
FROM valid_status
ON CONFLICT (telegram_user_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  status_code = EXCLUDED.status_code,
  updated_at = NOW(),
  updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO user_status_history (
  telegram_user_id,
  status_code,
  changed_at,
  changed_by
)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  NOW(),
  $1
);

SELECT
  ws.code,
  ws.title,
  ws.emoji,
  parent.title AS parent_title,
  parent.emoji AS parent_emoji
FROM work_statuses ws
LEFT JOIN work_statuses parent
  ON parent.id = ws.parent_id
WHERE ws.code = $1
LIMIT 1;

parameters.text: 📊 وضعیت پرسنل  لطفاً نوع مشاهده را انتخاب کنید:

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  code,
  title,
  emoji,
  sort_order
FROM work_statuses
WHERE is_active = TRUE
  AND parent_id IS NULL
ORDER BY sort_order, id;

SELECT
  u.telegram_user_id,
  u.first_name,
  u.last_name,
  u.username,
  u.department,
  COALESCE(dt.title, u.department, '—') AS department_title,

  ws.title AS status_title,
  parent.title AS parent_status_title,

  cs.updated_at
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN department_teams dt
  ON dt.code = u.department
LEFT JOIN user_current_status cs
  ON cs.telegram_user_id::text = u.telegram_user_id::text
LEFT JOIN work_statuses ws
  ON ws.code = cs.status_code
LEFT JOIN work_statuses parent
  ON parent.id = ws.parent_id
WHERE u.department = $1
  AND u.status = 'approved'
  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $3
ORDER BY u.first_name, u.last_name, u.id
LIMIT 5 OFFSET $2;

SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total_count
FROM users
WHERE department = $1
  AND status = 'approved'
  AND telegram_user_id::text <> $2;

SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total_count
FROM user_current_status cs
JOIN users u
  ON u.telegram_user_id::bigint = cs.telegram_user_id::bigint
WHERE cs.status_code = $1
  AND u.status = 'approved'
  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $2;

SELECT
  u.telegram_user_id,
  u.first_name,
  u.last_name,
  u.username,
  u.department,
  cs.status_code,
  ws.title AS status_title,
  ws.emoji AS status_emoji,
  parent.title AS parent_status_title,
  parent.emoji AS parent_status_emoji,
  cs.updated_at
FROM user_current_status cs
JOIN users u
  ON u.telegram_user_id::bigint = cs.telegram_user_id::bigint
JOIN work_statuses ws
  ON ws.code = cs.status_code
LEFT JOIN work_statuses parent
  ON parent.id = ws.parent_id
WHERE cs.status_code = $1
  AND u.status = 'approved'
  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $3
ORDER BY u.first_name, u.last_name, u.id
LIMIT 5 OFFSET $2;

SELECT
  dt.code AS department,
  dt.title AS department_title,
  COUNT(u.id)::int AS users_count
FROM department_teams dt
LEFT JOIN users u
  ON u.department = dt.code
  AND u.status = 'approved'
  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $1
WHERE dt.is_active = TRUE
GROUP BY dt.code, dt.title, dt.sort_order, dt.id
ORDER BY dt.sort_order, dt.id;

SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total_count
FROM users
WHERE department = $1
  AND status = 'approved'
  AND telegram_user_id::text <> $2;

SELECT
  u.telegram_user_id,
  u.first_name,
  u.last_name,
  u.username,
  u.department,
  COALESCE(dt.title, u.department, '—') AS department_title,

  ws.title AS status_title,
  parent.title AS parent_status_title,

  cs.updated_at
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN department_teams dt
  ON dt.code = u.department
LEFT JOIN user_current_status cs
  ON cs.telegram_user_id::text = u.telegram_user_id::text
LEFT JOIN work_statuses ws
  ON ws.code = cs.status_code
LEFT JOIN work_statuses parent
  ON parent.id = ws.parent_id
WHERE u.telegram_user_id::text = $1
  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $2
LIMIT 1;

=👋 خوش آمدید

✅ شما به عنوان کارمند وارد سامانه شدید.
لطفاً یکی از گزینه‌های زیر را انتخاب کنید:

UPDATE user_actions
SET status = 'done'
WHERE telegram_user_id = $1
  AND status = 'active'
  AND action_type IN ('add_day_menu', 'edit_day_menu', 'food_booking');

INSERT INTO user_actions (telegram_user_id, action_type, action_data, status, created_at)
VALUES (
  $1,
  'add_day_menu',
  json_build_object(
    'week_start_date', $2,
    'day_of_week', $3
  ),
  'active',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *;

SELECT
  ws.code,
  ws.title,
  ws.emoji,
  parent.title AS parent_title,
  parent.emoji AS parent_emoji
FROM user_current_status ucs
JOIN work_statuses ws
  ON ws.code = ucs.status_code
LEFT JOIN work_statuses parent
  ON parent.id = ws.parent_id
WHERE ucs.telegram_user_id = $1
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total_count
FROM users
WHERE status = 'approved'
  AND telegram_user_id::text <> $1;

SELECT
  u.telegram_user_id,
  u.first_name,
  u.last_name,
  u.username,
  u.department,
  ws.title AS status_title,
  ws.emoji AS status_emoji,
  cs.updated_at
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN user_current_status cs
  ON cs.telegram_user_id::bigint = u.telegram_user_id::bigint
LEFT JOIN work_statuses ws
  ON ws.code = cs.status_code
WHERE u.status = 'approved'
  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $2
ORDER BY u.first_name, u.last_name, u.id
LIMIT 5 OFFSET $1;

FROM week_menu
WHERE week_start_date = $1
  AND day_of_week = $2
LIMIT 1;

  parent.title AS parent_status_title,

  cs.updated_at
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN department_teams dt
  ON dt.code = u.department
LEFT JOIN user_current_status cs
  ON cs.telegram_user_id::text = u.telegram_user_id::text
LEFT JOIN work_statuses ws
  ON ws.code = cs.status_code

  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $3

FROM food_menu_notifications

parameters.text: 📣 اطلاع‌رسانی این هفته قبلاً ارسال شده است.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  telegram_user_id,
  first_name,
  username
FROM users
WHERE status = 'approved'
  AND access_level = 'user'
  AND telegram_user_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY id ASC;

nodes.name: Get Approved Users For Week Menu Publish

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO food_menu_notifications (
  week_start_date,
  sent_by,
  sent_at
)
VALUES ($1, $2, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (week_start_date)
DO NOTHING;

SELECT
  child.id,
  child.code,
  child.title,
  child.emoji,
  child.sort_order,
  parent.id AS parent_id,
  parent.code AS parent_code,
  parent.title AS parent_title,
  parent.emoji AS parent_emoji,
  CASE
    WHEN ucs.status_code = child.code THEN TRUE
    ELSE FALSE
  END AS is_current
FROM work_statuses child
JOIN work_statuses parent
  ON parent.id = child.parent_id
LEFT JOIN user_current_status ucs
  ON ucs.telegram_user_id::text = $2::text
WHERE child.is_active = TRUE
  AND child.is_selectable = TRUE
  AND child.parent_id = $1::int
ORDER BY child.sort_order, child.id;

SELECT
  child.id,
  child.code,
  child.title,
  child.emoji,
  child.sort_order,
  parent.id AS parent_id,
  parent.code AS parent_code,
  parent.title AS parent_title,
  parent.emoji AS parent_emoji
FROM work_statuses child
JOIN work_statuses parent
  ON parent.id = child.parent_id
WHERE child.is_active = TRUE
  AND child.is_selectable = TRUE
  AND child.parent_id = $1::int
ORDER BY child.sort_order, child.id;

SELECT title
FROM department_teams

UPDATE user_actions

parameters.text: 🔎 جستجوی همکار  نام، نام خانوادگی، یوزرنیم، واحد یا Telegram ID همکار را ارسال کنید.  مثال: سارا @sara فروش

=عبارت جستجو باید حداقل ۲ کاراکتر باشد.
لطفاً دوباره نام، یوزرنیم یا واحد همکار را ارسال کنید.

parameters.query:
WITH q AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(
      REPLACE(
        REPLACE(
          REPLACE($1, '@', ''),
          'تیم ',
          ''
        ),
        'واحد ',
        ''
      )
    ) AS search_text
)
SELECT
  u.telegram_user_id,
  u.first_name,
  u.last_name,
  u.username,
  u.department,

  dt.title AS department_title,

  ws.title AS status_title,
  ws.emoji AS status_emoji,

  parent.title AS parent_status_title,
  parent.emoji AS parent_status_emoji,

  cs.updated_at
FROM users u
CROSS JOIN q
LEFT JOIN department_teams dt
  ON dt.code = u.department
LEFT JOIN user_current_status cs
  ON cs.telegram_user_id::bigint = u.telegram_user_id::bigint
LEFT JOIN work_statuses ws
  ON ws.code = cs.status_code
LEFT JOIN work_statuses parent
  ON parent.id = ws.parent_id
WHERE u.status = 'approved'
  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $2
  AND (
    COALESCE(u.first_name, '') ILIKE '%' || q.search_text || '%'
    OR COALESCE(u.last_name, '') ILIKE '%' || q.search_text || '%'
    OR COALESCE(u.username, '') ILIKE '%' || q.search_text || '%'
    OR u.telegram_user_id::text ILIKE '%' || q.search_text || '%'

    OR COALESCE(u.department, '') ILIKE '%' || q.search_text || '%'
    OR COALESCE(dt.code, '') ILIKE '%' || q.search_text || '%'
    OR COALESCE(dt.title, '') ILIKE '%' || q.search_text || '%'
  )
ORDER BY u.first_name, u.last_name, u.id
LIMIT 10;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Normalize Employee Search Text').item.json.search }},{{ $('Normalize Employee Search Text').item.json.telegram_user_id }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE user_actions
SET status = 'done'
WHERE telegram_user_id = $1
  AND status = 'active'
  AND action_type = 'status_employee_search';

WITH target_menu AS (
  SELECT id, week_start_date, day_of_week
  FROM week_menu
  WHERE id = $1::bigint
),
deleted_reservations AS (
  DELETE FROM reservations r
  USING target_menu tm
  WHERE r.week_start_date = tm.week_start_date
    AND r.day_of_week = tm.day_of_week
  RETURNING r.*
),
deleted_menu AS (
  DELETE FROM week_menu wm
  USING target_menu tm
  WHERE wm.id = tm.id
  RETURNING wm.*
)
SELECT
  tm.week_start_date,
  tm.day_of_week,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deleted_menu)::int AS deleted_menu_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deleted_reservations)::int AS deleted_reservations_count
FROM target_menu tm;

SELECT
  u.telegram_user_id,
  u.first_name,
  u.last_name,
  u.username,
  u.department,
  COALESCE(dt.title, u.department, '—') AS department_title
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN department_teams dt
  ON dt.code = u.department
WHERE u.status = 'approved'
  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $2
ORDER BY u.first_name, u.last_name, u.id
LIMIT 20 OFFSET $1;

SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total_count
FROM users
WHERE status = 'approved'
  AND telegram_user_id::text <> $1;

WITH params AS (
    SELECT
        $1::text AS target_user_id,
        $2::timestamp AS start_ts,
        $3::timestamp AS end_ts,

        -- ساعت کاری را اینجا تنظیم کن
        TIME '09:00' AS work_start_time,
        TIME '18:00' AS work_end_time
),

employee AS (
    SELECT
        u.telegram_user_id,
        u.first_name,
        u.last_name,
        u.username,
        u.department,
        COALESCE(dt.title, u.department, '—') AS department_title
    FROM users u
    LEFT JOIN department_teams dt
        ON dt.code = u.department
    CROSS JOIN params p
    WHERE u.telegram_user_id::text = p.target_user_id
    LIMIT 1
),

workdays AS (
    SELECT
        day_date::date AS day_date,
        (day_date::date + p.work_start_time) AS work_start,
        (day_date::date + p.work_end_time) AS work_end
    FROM params p
    CROSS JOIN generate_series(
        date_trunc('day', p.start_ts)::date,
        (date_trunc('day', p.end_ts) - interval '1 day')::date,
        interval '1 day'
    ) AS day_date
    WHERE EXTRACT(DOW FROM day_date::date) <> 5
    -- PostgreSQL: Friday = 5
    -- جمعه حساب نمی‌شود
),

seed AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (w.day_date)
        w.day_date,
        h.telegram_user_id,
        h.status_code,
        h.changed_at
    FROM workdays w
    JOIN user_status_history h
        ON h.telegram_user_id::text = (SELECT target_user_id FROM params)
       AND h.changed_at::date = w.day_date
       AND h.changed_at < w.work_start
    ORDER BY w.day_date, h.changed_at DESC
),

in_work_range AS (
    SELECT
        w.day_date,
        h.telegram_user_id,
        h.status_code,
        h.changed_at
    FROM workdays w
    JOIN user_status_history h
        ON h.telegram_user_id::text = (SELECT target_user_id FROM params)
       AND h.changed_at >= w.work_start
       AND h.changed_at < w.work_end
),

events AS (
    SELECT * FROM seed
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM in_work_range
),

spans AS (
    SELECT
        e.day_date,
        e.telegram_user_id,
        e.status_code,
        GREATEST(e.changed_at, w.work_start) AS span_start,
        LEAST(
            COALESCE(
                LEAD(e.changed_at) OVER (
                    PARTITION BY e.day_date, e.telegram_user_id
                    ORDER BY e.changed_at
                ),
                w.work_end
            ),
            w.work_end
        ) AS span_end
    FROM events e
    JOIN workdays w
        ON w.day_date = e.day_date
),

durations AS (
    SELECT
        telegram_user_id,
        status_code,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (span_end - span_start)) / 3600.0 AS hours
    FROM spans
    WHERE span_end > span_start
)

SELECT
    e.telegram_user_id,
    e.first_name,
    e.last_name,
    e.username,
    e.department_title,

    d.status_code,
    COALESCE(ws.title, d.status_code) AS status_title,
    COALESCE(parent.title, '') AS parent_status_title,

    ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(d.hours), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_hours
FROM employee e
LEFT JOIN durations d
    ON d.telegram_user_id::text = e.telegram_user_id::text
LEFT JOIN work_statuses ws
    ON ws.code = d.status_code
LEFT JOIN work_statuses parent
    ON parent.id = ws.parent_id
GROUP BY
    e.telegram_user_id,
    e.first_name,
    e.last_name,
    e.username,
    e.department_title,
    d.status_code,
    ws.title,
    parent.title
ORDER BY
    parent.title,
    ws.title,
    d.status_code;

WITH closed AS (
  UPDATE user_actions
  SET status = 'done'
  WHERE telegram_user_id = $1
    AND action_type IN (
      'status_employee_report_search',
      'status_employee_search'
    )
    AND status = 'active'
  RETURNING id
)
INSERT INTO user_actions (
  telegram_user_id,
  action_type,
  action_data,
  status,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  $1,
  'status_employee_report_search',
  json_build_object(
    'period', $2
  ),
  'active',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *;

parameters.text:
=🔎 جستجوی کارمند برای گزارش وضعیت

لطفاً نام، یوزرنیم یا آیدی کارمند را ارسال کنید.

مثال:
ali
@alireza_av

parameters.query:
SELECT
  u.telegram_user_id,
  u.first_name,
  u.last_name,
  u.username,
  u.department,
  COALESCE(dt.title, u.department, '—') AS department_title
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN department_teams dt
  ON dt.code = u.department
WHERE u.status = 'approved'
  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $2
  AND (
    u.telegram_user_id::text ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
    OR u.username ILIKE '%' || REPLACE($1, '@', '') || '%'
    OR u.first_name ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
    OR u.last_name ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
    OR CONCAT_WS(' ', u.first_name, u.last_name) ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
  )
ORDER BY u.first_name, u.last_name, u.id
LIMIT 20;
